Rung.Comment: Reset counter1 with default "PRESET" equals four at the first scan andevery time when it is done.
Add an I/O timer to copy implicit messaging data. The timer resolution is 100ms.
Output data is from Switch_Param which is modifiable to client tools (RSView or Factory Talk). Copy it to Switch_Output tag. The input data is in Switch_Input, copy it to Switch_Param for monitoring.
The timer_explicit is for sending explicit message (Get_Attributes_All & Get_Attribute_Single). The timer resolution is 1000ms. It should not be too small preventing from packet storm.

If ClassSelectCounter.ACC== 1, send GAA of Identity object (Class ID = 1). If ClassSelectCounter.ACC== 2, send GAA of TCP/IP object (Class ID = 245). If ClassSelectCounter.ACC== 3, send GAA of Vendor object (class ID = 1028) If ClassSelectCounter.ACC==4~15, snd GAA of Ethernet Link object(Class ID = 246)
Rung.Text: XIC(timer_explicit.DN)CTU(SelectCounter,?,?)[LIMIT(1,SelectCounter.ACC,2) MOVE(1,Get_AllMessage.Instance) MOVE(1,Get_AllMessage.Attribute) [EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,1) MOVE(1,Get_AllMessage.Class) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,2) MOVE(245,Get_AllMessage.Class) ] FLL(0,storage[0],200) MSG(Get_AllMessage) ,LIMIT(3,SelectCounter.ACC,11) MOVE(1028,Get_SingMessage.Class) MOVE(1,Get_SingMessage.Instance) [EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,3) MOVE(1,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,4) MOVE(2,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,5) MOVE(5,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,6) MOVE(6,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,7) MOVE(8,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,8) MOVE(9,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,9) MOVE(23,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,10) MOVE(25,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,11) MOVE(26,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ] FLL(0,storage[0],200) MSG(Get_SingMessage) ,LIMIT(12,SelectCounter.ACC,141) SUB(SelectCounter.ACC,12,AttriSelectCounter) DIV(AttriSelectCounter,13,temp_data) ADD(temp_data,1,portnum_index) MOD(AttriSelectCounter,13,AttriSelectCounter) MOVE(246,Get_SingMessage.Class) MOVE(portnum_index,Get_SingMessage.Instance) [EQ(AttriSelectCounter,0) MOVE(3,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,1) MOVE(4,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,2) MOVE(6,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,3) MOVE(103,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,4) MOVE(108,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,5) MOVE(109,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,6) MOVE(110,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,7) MOVE(111,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,8) MOVE(112,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,9) MOVE(113,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,10) MOVE(118,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,11) MOVE(1,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,12) MOVE(2,Get_SingMessage.Attribute) ] FLL(0,storage_single[0],70) MSG(Get_SingMessage) ];

Rung.Comment: Set internal ONS_Output bit based on DN bit of Message - allows subsequent operations to be completed more efficiently

Copy results of Get Attribute All If counter = 1: Identity Object - Class 1, Instance 1, Attribute 1 If counter = 2: TCP/IP Interface Object, Class 245, Instance 1, Attribute 1 If counter = 3 : Vendor Object, Class 1028, Instance 1, Attribute 1 If counter = 4~15 : EtherNet Link Object, Class 246, Instance 1 to 12 , Attribute 1 - EthernetLink[1-12]
Rung.Text: XIC(Update_flag)[EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,1) [COP(storage[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Idnetity.Vendor_ID,1) ,COP(storage[2],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Idnetity.Device_Type,1) ,COP(storage[4],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Idnetity.Product_Code,1) ,COP(storage[10],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Idnetity.Serial_Number,2) ,MOVE(storage[14],String_Len) MOVE(String_Len,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Idnetity.Product_Name.LEN) FLL(0,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Idnetity.Product_Name.DATA[0],28) COP(storage[15],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Idnetity.Product_Name.DATA[0],String_Len) ] ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,2) [COP(storage[18],Switch_Parameter.Switch_TCPIP.IP_Address,2) ,COP(storage[22],Switch_Parameter.Switch_TCPIP.Network_Mask,2) ,MOVE(0,String_Len) COP(storage[38],String_Len,1) ADD(String_Len,40,String_Len) ,COP(storage[40],Switch_Parameter.Switch_TCPIP.Host_Name.LEN,1) ADD(String_Len,2,String_Len) ,COP(storage[42],Switch_Parameter.Switch_TCPIP.Host_Name.DATA[0],64) ] ,LIMIT(3,SelectCounter.ACC,11) [EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,3) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Vendor.System_Firmware_Version,2) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,4) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Vendor.System_Fault_Status,2) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,5) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Vendor.Port_Enbale[0],4) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,6) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Vendor.Port_Link_Status[0],4) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,7) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Vendor.Query_Interval,2) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,8) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Vendor.IGMP_Enhanced_Mode,1) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,9) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Vendor.CPU_Usage,1) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,10) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Vendor.Reset_Mib_Counter,1) ,EQ(SelectCounter.ACC,11) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Vendor.Redundant_Device_Mode,2) ] ,LIMIT(12,SelectCounter.ACC,89) SUB(SelectCounter.ACC,12,AttriSelectCounter) DIV(AttriSelectCounter,13,temp_data) ADD(temp_data,1,portnum_index) MOD(AttriSelectCounter,13,AttriSelectCounter) [EQ(AttriSelectCounter,0) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Physical_Address[0],6) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,1) [COP(storage_single[16],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].InErrors,2) ,COP(storage_single[40],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].OutErrors,2) ] ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,2) [LIMIT(0,storage_single[0],2) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Control_Bits,1) ,[EQ(storage_single[2],0) ,EQ(storage_single[2],10) ,EQ(storage_single[2],100) ,EQ(storage_single[2],1000) ] COP(storage_single[2],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Forced_Interface_Speed,1) ] ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,3) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Interface_Utilization,1) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,4) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Tx_Unicast_Packet_Rate,1) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,5) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Rx_Unicast_Packet_Rate,1) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,6) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Tx_Multicast_Packet_Rate,2) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,7) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Rx_Multicast_Packet_Rate,2) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,8) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Tx_Broadcast_Packet_Rate,2) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,9) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Rx_Broadcast_Packet_Rate,2) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,10) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Redundant_Port_Status,2) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,11) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Interface_Speed,2) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,12) COP(storage_single[0],Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Interface_Flags,1) ] EQ(Switch_Parameter.Switch_HMI_Set.Select_Port,portnum_index) MOVE(Switch_Parameter.Switch_HMI_Set.Select_Port,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.Port) [EQ(AttriSelectCounter,1) [COP(Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].InErrors,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.Error_Counter,2) ADD(Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].OutErrors,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.Error_Counter,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.Error_Counter) ,COP(Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].InErrors,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.Rx_Packet_Error,2) COP(Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].OutErrors,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.Rx_Packet_Error,2) ] ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,2) COP(Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Control_Bits,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.Control_Bits,1) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,3) COP(Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Interface_Utilization,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.Interface_Utilization,1) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,4) COP(Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Tx_Unicast_Packet_Rate,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.TX_Unicast_Packet_Rate,2) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,5) COP(Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Rx_Unicast_Packet_Rate,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.RX_Unicast_Packet_Rate,2) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,6) COP(Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Tx_Multicast_Packet_Rate,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.TX_Multicast_Packet_Rate,2) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,7) COP(Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Rx_Multicast_Packet_Rate,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.RX_Multicast_Packet_Rate,2) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,8) COP(Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Tx_Broadcast_Packet_Rate,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.TX_Broadcast_Packet_Rate,2) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,9) COP(Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Rx_Broadcast_Packet_Rate,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.RX_Broadcast_Packet_Rate,2) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,10) COP(Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Redundant_Port_Status,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.Redundant_Port_Role,2) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,11) COP(Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Interface_Speed,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.Port_Speed,1) ,EQ(AttriSelectCounter,12) COP(Switch_Parameter.Switch_Ethernet_Link[portnum_index].Interface_Flags,Switch_Parameter.Switch_Data.Port_Interface_Flag,1) ] ];

Rung.Comment: process and analyse IP address and subnet data and convert the data type from the integer to the string
process and analyse MAC address and convert the data type from the integer to the string
<13, 14> Set the option "Reset the mib counter"
